title: polygala bracteata
intro: Polygala bracteata, also known as Yin Chai Hu, is a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family that is native to China and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Polygala bracteata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, Polygala bracteata is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed as a capsule or supplement.
